subject: Flight Time to Paris
body:
The flight time from Teterboro to Shannon is 6:02 and from  Shannon to Paris 
is 1:08 for a combined time of 7:10.  The average wind is  +21 knots.  The 
computer showed we did not have adequate fuel reserves  going non-stop with only 
44 minutes of fuel left.  If they estimate 44  minutes remaining, we would 
probably have less than 22 minutes based on past  performance.
 
If we depart Teterboro at 11:00 p.m. we would arrive Shannon  at 10:02 a.m.
If we depart Shannon at 10:30 a.m. we would arrive Paris at  12:38 p.m.
 
Dave



**************Vote for your city's best dining and nightlife. City's Best 
2008.      (http://citysbest.aol.com?ncid=aolacg00050000000102)
